## LibraryRuntime.IIngredient.isFat() method

Returns true if this is a fat ingredient. When true, fat-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isFat(): this is IFatIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IFatIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.ifatingredient.md)
